sql_array: CREATE TABLE demo_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, col1 VARCHAR(255), col2 TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO demo_table (id, col1, col2) VALUES (1, 'sample text', 'example data'), (2, NULL, 'another example'), (3, 'keyword search', 'full-text content');
SELECT * FROM demo_table WHERE col1 IS NOT NULL AND bif:contains(col2, 'example');
SELECT server_root() AS server_directory, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM demo_table WHERE bif:contains(col2, collate 'utf8_general_ci', 'keyword')) AS keyword_count;
SELECT col1, COUNT(*) FROM demo_table GROUP BY col1 HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT id, col1, server_root() FROM demo_table WHERE bif:contains(col2, 'sample') ORDER BY id DESC;
SELECT id, col1 FROM demo_table WHERE bif:contains(col2, (SELECT CONCAT('keyword ', NULL)));
SELECT server_root() AS directory FROM demo_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM demo_table WHERE col1 = 'sample text') OR bif:contains(col2, 'example data');
SELECT col1, col2 FROM demo_table WHERE bif:contains(col2, 'another') AND created_at < (SELECT NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY');
SELECT id, bif:contains(col2, col1) FROM demo_table WHERE col1 IN (SELECT col1 FROM demo_table WHERE col1 IS NOT NULL) ORDER BY id DESC;
